name: com.beamable.notifications.web
description: Standalone Unity bridge that lets a web/React UI running inside a Unity WebView drive the Beamable native notifications binary (iOS + Android) — local + remote push, permissions, deep links, closed-app analytics. Zero dependency on the Beamable Unity SDK (com.beamable): the page uses the Beamable Web SDK, and this package is a thin JSON relay between the WebView and the native library. Bring your own WebView plugin (gree/unity-webview, Vuplex, uniwebview, …).
